# errSSLATSCertificateTrustViolation

**Global Variable**

The peer certificate wasn’t issued by a trusted peer.

## Declaration

```swift
var errSSLATSCertificateTrustViolation: OSStatus { get }
```

## Overview

For more information about App Transport Security (ATS) compliance, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/preventing-insecure-network-connections].
title: errSSLATSCertificateTrustViolation
